tasks.title: InspectorToolkit skeleton + Pydantic input schemas + filter builder
tasks.parallelism_notes: Foundation task; all other tasks depend on the class skeleton and schemas.

tasks.title: Direct read operations (list_findings, aggregate, ECR image, coverage, account status)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Depends on TASK-1079 skeleton. TASK-1080 and TASK-1082 could theoretically run in parallel since they touch different methods, but they share the same file and both build on the skeleton — sequential is safer.

tasks.title: Composite read operations (security posture + top vulnerable resources)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Depends on TASK-1080 direct reads being implemented — composite methods orchestrate the same API calls and need the normalization helpers.

tasks.title: Async export operations (findings report + SBOM export)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Only depends on TASK-1079 skeleton. Touches different methods than TASK-1080/1081 — could run in parallel with TASK-1080 if in separate worktrees, but spec recommends sequential in a single worktree since all methods live in one file.

tasks.title: IAM policy sidecar + package wiring + example
tasks.parallelism_notes: Final wiring task — depends on all implementation tasks being complete before re-exporting and documenting.
